$comment: Reviewed and patched in ST-013 (2026-05-04): added objective (string), restrictions (array), and handoff (string) fields which were required by the Markdown spec (SCHEMA.md) but absent from the initial ST-010 scaffold.
title: Steward Settlement Record
description: Schema for bounded construction work units. This schema validates shape only and does not grant Steward execution, clinical authority, merge authority, or production readiness.

objective.description: One-paragraph statement of what this Settlement delivers. Required per SCHEMA.md.

restrictions.description: Additional restrictions beyond Territory invariants that apply specifically to this Settlement.

handoff.description: What is produced for the next agent: artifacts created, tracking docs updated, recommended next Settlement.

examples.title: ST-012 Settler Profile Registry
examples.objective: Create 9 Settler profile records and a registry index under HealthOS/Constructor/Settler/settlers/ without implementing Settlers as executable agents, Settlement instances, Steward CLI, Forge MCP, or runtime behavior.
invariants: Construction-system boundary: no clinical authority, no merge authority, no runtime behavior modified.
Settler profiles are documentation scaffolds only; no profile may claim executable agent status.
Official docs remain canonical; Settler profile records are subordinate.
healthos-forge-mcp naming must be used (not healthos-mcp).
restrictions: Do not modify Swift source under swift/Sources/ or swift/Tests/.
Do not modify TypeScript source under HealthOS/Constructor/ts/.
Do not modify Territory records under HealthOS/Constructor/Settler/territories/.
Do not create Settlement instances, Steward CLI, Forge MCP, or prompt generation engine.
allowedChanges: Create Settler profile .md files under HealthOS/Constructor/Settler/settlers/.
forbiddenChanges: Any Swift or TypeScript source modification.
Any production-readiness, clinical authority, or merge authority claim.
doneCriteria: 9 Settler profile files exist under HealthOS/Constructor/Settler/settlers/.
residualGaps: ST-018 healthos-forge-mcp: implemented seam, repository-maintenance only.
examples.handoff: 10 files created under HealthOS/Constructor/Settler/settlers/ (README.md + 9 profiles). 4 tracking docs updated. Validation: make validate-docs PASS, make validate-all PASS. ST-013 is the next construction-system task.
